title: aleuritopteris bullosa
intro: Aleuritopteris bullosa, also known as the Chinese cork fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aleuritopteris bullosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Aleuritopteris bullosa is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes in capsule or tablet form for modern herbal use.
